sub: emulated by your browser, streamed from the device
btn_stop_tip: Stop and return to the library
pick_to_boot: Select a program below to boot it.
none_yet: No DOS programs yet — add one with the DOS Importer.
load_fail_net: Couldn't load the emulator from the network.
load_fail_hint: For offline use, place js-dos.js and js-dos.css (plus the emulator wasm assets) in apps/dosbox/www/vendor/ on the SD card.
empty_lib: No programs in {dir}. Use the DOS Importer app to add a game (.jsdos / .zip / .img / .exe), or tools/add-win311.mjs for Windows 3.11.
